title: Vitalize
description: An addon for Spirit that simulates the killing of mobs and their drops
body:
Vitalize is a tech mod for Minecraft 1.19.2+ that allows you to simulate the death of any mob with a new machine called the 'Soul Revitalizer'. You can upgrade the machine with various different pylons that can affect the speed, energy usage, drops and conditions of the revitalizer.
